packageRules.description: Ignore major bumps for net.kyori:adventure-* — Adventure 5.x is compileOnly but the server's bundled Adventure (typically 4.x via Paper/Spigot) is what loads at runtime. Compiling against 5.x against a 4.x-bundled runtime risks NoSuchMethodError / ClassNotFoundException. Revisit once 5.x is the standard bundled version.
